name: Survive The Troll
short_description: Survive the Troll is a "Chill" Real Time Strategy game in which you play as a Troll, a charismatic Hero you can upgrade in your base, or as an Elf, a builder which is common food for the Troll. Cooperate or destroy. You choose.
detailed_description:
Survive the Troll is a multiplayer game in which one Troll fights against up to 9 Elves.

Gameplay

In the Cloudy Arena, you will be provided with two kinds of gameplay:



  • The Troll is playing solo against all the elves. His goal? To crush every Elf he sees. To do so, he can upgrade his stats in his base, the Troll Hut. He gets passive income using troll wards, which allow him to teleport throughout the map. The Troll is hungry... Hungry for Elf meat!


  • The Elf is playing with a bunch of other Elves, up to a maximum of 9. In order to survive the Troll, they will have to build a base with a House, a Wall and a Tower, which attacks the Troll when it's close. Yet their goal is not to stay in their base forever, in order to continue expanding their income, they will have to cooperate in order to get gifts that contain essential resources, or troll wards! In the end, they may even take down the Troll ... ]

Customization

You can customize your look with a system of skins, that you can setup and buy in the Market on the main menu.
You can only gain Wcoins (which are used to buy skins) by playing the game !

This game is thought to be a "chill" game, so there are no ranks and ranking system.
